purpose: Defines default date/time basis for Drishvara daily context, Panchang scaffold, festival view scaffold, sports context and subscriber guidance scaffolds.
guardrails: Default date for Indian users must be calculated using Asia/Kolkata, not UTC.
Panchang, Vedic guidance, festival view and subscriber guidance must preserve timezone basis.
Users may later select a different timezone, but IST remains the default.
Do not treat UTC date as Drishvara daily date unless explicitly selected.
